header: 3MultAttnAttrib: A Training-Free Approach for Multimodal Attribution

images.caption: Figure 1:MultAttnAttrib: We identify signals for each attention head, then filter to select cross-modal heads. We then calibrate the threshold to maximize F1 scores on the probe set fromMultAttrEval. For attribution, we use our topkkheads to generate attention spans and return the final results using our calibrated thresholds.
